[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm begging of you, please don't take my man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Your beauty is beyond compare[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
With flaming locks of auburn hair[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
With ivory skin and eyes of emerald green[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Your smile is like a breath of spring[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Your voice is soft like summer rain[/tab]

			TECUMSEH VALLEY

[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
		The name she gave was Caroline[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
		Daughter of a miner[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
		And her ways were free and it seemed to me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
		The sunshine walked beside her[/tab]

		She came from Spencer across the hill
		She said her Pa had sent her
		'Cause the coal was low and soon the snow
		Would turn the skies to winter

		Sh

Capo 1 for the official video  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y8AWFf7EAc4
No capo for the original studio version  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WIF4_Sm-rgQ

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I heard there was a secret chord[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
That David played and it pleased the Lord[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
But you don't really care for music, do you?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Well it goes like this the fourth, the fifth[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
The minor fall and the major lift[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
The baffled king composing hallelujah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelu-u-u-u-jah ....[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Well, your faith was strong

Lady In Black - Uriah Heep

[Intro]
| [ch]Am[/ch] | % |

[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
She came to me one morning, one lonely Sunday morning[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Her long hair flowing in the midwinter wind[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
I know not how she found me for in darkness I was walking[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
And destruction lay around me from a fight I could not win[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]             | [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] |

[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  |       [ch]Am[/ch] |
  Ah...  ahahah...  ahahah[/tab]

| [ch]Am[/ch] | % | % |

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
She asked me name my foe then, I said the need within some men[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
To fight and kill their brothers without thought of love or God[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
And I begged her give me horses to trample down my enemies[/tab]
